home.title: AcademiqForge
home.heroH1: From idea to finished paper, with less friction and more rigor.
home.heroLead: Shaped by experience, hardened for usability, and polished to carry researchers from scattered notes to structured, defensible writing.
home.meta3: Feedback and Suggestions on Writing from the Latest AI Models
home.pillar1Body: Built from real doctoral workflows so the path from concept to completed paper feels guided, not improvised.
home.pillar2Body: A calm, minimal interface that removes friction and keeps your attention on research, writing, and momentum.
home.pillar3Body: Designed to carry you from first idea to finished paper with structure, feedback, and progress built in.
home.languageHint: Applies across the site, emails, and Stripe checkout. Default is English.

product.title: Product
product.headline: Calm enough for deep work. Smart enough to move you forward.
product.sub: AcademiqForge combines writing, source organization, argument feedback, and structural guidance in one restrained workspace.
product.ctaHeadline: Build with more clarity. Finish with more confidence.
product.ctaSub: Start with a focused writing environment and grow into the full research operating system.
product.workflowHeadline: A system designed to keep research moving.
product.workflowSub: Bring research into one place, shape it into structure, strengthen the logic, and keep progressing toward a finished paper.
product.featuresHeadline: Three connected environments, one research flow.

anvil.name: The Anvil
anvil.desc: Write in a focused workspace with argument guidance, clarity feedback, and completion momentum.

archive.name: The Archive
archive.desc: Capture, organize, and connect sources so your evidence is always within reach.

lattice.name: The Lattice
lattice.desc: Map sources to claims and strengthen the logical structure of your paper.

product.mockDemoP1: This study employed a qualitative multiple-case design to explore how critical thinking and relationship-development factors interact during early-stage intercultural business relationships.
product.mockDemoP2: Data collection included semi-structured interviews, researcher memos, and document review to support triangulation and contextual depth.
product.mockHint: Consider adding one sentence clarifying why multiple-case design is stronger than a single-case alternative.

auth.resetSuccess: Your password was reset. Sign in with your new password.

register.title: Create an account
register.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
register.membershipLead: Continue with a free account (includes a trial where applicable), or go straight to paid membership after you create your account.

account.title: Account
account.sub: Here you can manage your profile, subscription, and associated billing details.
account.profileMeta: Update your details below. Email is your sign-in identity and can’t be changed.
account.passwordForgot: Forgot your password? Send a reset link by email
account.languageMeta: Choose the interface language. Signed-in preference is saved to your account; visitors use a browser cookie.
account.activeMember: You have an active membership. The Foundry and member features are unlocked.
account.pastDue: Your last payment failed (past due). Use Update Card on File below or the Stripe emails you receive to update your payment method.
account.trialing: Free trial active. Upgrade to continue forging and to unlock all features.
account.resumeMeta: Restores renewal after the date above. You can turn auto-renew off again anytime.
account.billingPending: Stripe is confirming your membership — this usually takes a few seconds. We’ll reload when you’re active, or
account.modalCancelText: Are you sure that you wish to turn off auto-renewal? Doing so will limit your access to the end of your billing period.
account.paymentHistoryIntro: Completed charges on your membership are listed below. Official receipts are sent to your email when a payment succeeds.
account.noInvoices: No paid invoices on file yet. After your first successful payment, entries will appear here.

billing.subscribeSub: Complete your membership — {interval} plan, secure payment on AcademiqForge.
billing.cardBlurb: Card details are collected by Stripe and never touch our servers.
billing.paymentMethodLead: Add/Update the Card Used to Process Payments
billing.paymentMethodBlurb: Card details stay with card processor; AcademiqForge does not store your card information.
billing.paymentMethodLegal: By providing your card information, you allow AC&C Services LTD, doing business as AcademiqForge, to charge your card for future payments in accordance with their terms.

project.newSub: Name your work, pick a purpose and citation style, and choose a section template.
project.name: Project name
project.otherSectionsIntro: Please add the section names for your document. Also, please enter the percentage of the entire document that each section represents. You can add up to 15 sections and they must total 100%.

dashboard.title: Portfolio dashboard
dashboard.sub: Your projects and quick entry into each workspace.
dashboard.trialBar: Free trial active — ends {date}. Upgrade to unlock The Foundry and full membership.

workspace.anvilIntro: Where ideas are shaped and formed into arguments and reasoning.
workspace.trialBarFoundry: Free trial — ends {date}. The Foundry requires a paid plan.
workspace.crucibleIntro: Where ideas and arguments are strengthened by the work of others.
workspace.frameworkSub: Argument outline and evidence mapping for {project}.
workspace.insightFallback: Feedback and suggestions for this step will appear here.
workspace.insightAnvil: Anchor-based AI writing feedback for your section drafts.
workspace.insightCrucible: Source management and research tools will appear here.
workspace.insightFoundry: Generated research topics and gaps will appear here for paid members.
workspace.insightFramework: Argument outline and evidence mapping will appear here.
workspace.insightDefault: Anchor-based AI writing feedback for your section drafts.

billing.couldNotLoad: Billing could not load. Refresh the page or return to Account.
billing.couldNotStartCard: Could not start card update. Return to Account.

anvil.forgeWritePlaceholder: As you forge ahead, Forge Write Assist will appear in the canvas to the right.
anvil.forgeWriteEmpty: Forge Write Assist will appear here as you make progress with your writing.
anvil.addTextForFeedback: Add a bit more text for feedback.
anvil.sourcesPlaceholder: Select a section to view tagged sources.
anvil.referenceHint: Rebuild the reference section from every in-text citation recorded in this project (Crucible usage counts).
anvil.pendingChangeText: Please confirm or undo the current change before applying another suggestion.

crucible.forgeResearchEmptySources: Add sources to see related paper suggestions.
crucible.suggestionsPaused: Suggested Sources are paused while viewing the full source library.

account.estimateFailed: We couldn’t load an estimate. Stripe will show the exact amount when you confirm the switch.
account.estimatedChargePrefix: Estimated charge today if you switch:
account.switchToSuffix: billing? Proration is usually charged right away (not deferred to your next renewal).

errors.nameRequired: First and last name are required.
errors.passwordMinLength: New password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.passwordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
errors.exportFormatInvalid: Query format must be txt or docx.
errors.suggestionCategoryBody: Each suggestion needs category and non-empty body.
errors.suggestionStatusInvalid: status must be applied or ignored.
errors.aiKeywordsNotConfigured: AI keyword extraction is not configured (Bedrock).
errors.titleOrTagRequired: At least one title or tag is required.
errors.articleTitleOrCitationRequired: Article title or citation text is required.
errors.crucibleStatusInvalid: Invalid status. Must be unresolved, resolved, or dismissed.
errors.semanticScholarRateLimit: Semantic Scholar is temporarily rate-limiting requests. Please try again in a minute.
errors.semanticScholarNeedsApiKey: Semantic Scholar requires an API key for reliable access. Add SEMANTIC_SCHOLAR_API_KEY to your environment. Get a free key at semanticscholar.org/product/api.
